---
title: "Anna Christian Burke"
---

## Anna Christian Burke

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1889-95)

### Biography

She was a  translator from the French, author of works on the language of flowers;  she is called Mrs L. Burke and may be the wife of Luke Burke, editor of the <i>Ethnological Journal</i>;  if so her dates were probably 1821/2-1908.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
